title: FosterCareStatistics
description: An AGGREGATE foster-care measure for a reporting period — children in 24-hour foster care, foster-care placements by community district, adolescent permanency outcomes, educational continuity and high-school graduation rates, government-issued ID for youth, and psychiatric-medication use. Published only in aggregate; no individual child in foster care is ever exposed. Canonical schema reconciling 'Children In 24-hour Foster Care by Community District' (hfa5-7rzg), 'Foster Care Placements by Community District' (xg3x-h3g7), 'Adolescents in Foster Care (permanency outcomes)' (gx5n-2nma), 'High School Graduation Rates in Foster Care' (abgy-h8ag), 'Educational Continuity of Children in Foster Care' (j4t9-dyts), 'Government-Issued Personal Identification for Youth in Foster Care' (n5e5-z493), and 'Report to City Council on Use of Psychiatric Medication for Youth in Foster Care' (qw7r-btyb, 15 columns).

metric.description: Which foster-care measure this row reports.

value.description: The aggregate count, rate, or percentage.

unit.description: Unit of the value (count, percent, rate).

demographics.description: Demographic breakdowns where a dataset carries them (e.g. psychiatric-medication report by sex and age band).
